text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm undersized and races are hard on me,
Trainer works hard and conducts research for my
sake every day.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer's gone through every resource available,
and has even asked Agnes Tachyon for help.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It makes me really happy, and gives me the
motivation to work harder too.
